additionalInfo.description: Chain 1: Per-device edge processing for EdgeDevice_01/02/03. Works only on edge-layer fields. Hands off to Fog Intelligence Chain after saving.
Node 1: Annotate edge frame — uses edge fields only (raw_severity_code, top_trigger_feature). No fog fields accessed here.
Node 2: Save edge timeseries. Only edge-layer fields are in the message at this point.
Node 3: Route by raw edge severity. Severe goes straight to alarm. Mild is raw (unconfirmed by fog) — alarm is advisory until fog confirms.
Node 4: Create SEVERE_HYPOXIA alarm on the edge device. Details contain edge-only fields.
Node 5: Create MILD_HYPOXIA_UNCONFIRMED alarm. Advisory — awaits fog temporal confirmation.
Node 6: Clear SEVERE_HYPOXIA when edge returns to normal.
Node 7: Clear MILD_HYPOXIA_UNCONFIRMED when edge returns to normal.
Node 8: Hand-off to Fog Intelligence Chain. UPDATE ruleChainId after importing Fog Chain. The fog chain handles FogGateway_01 messages which carry ward_anomaly and adaptive fog fields.
